name: S-17 (SS-122)
events: 3 Aug 1942 USS S-17 departed the Panama Canal Zone for New London, Connecticut.
4 Aug 1942 At 1420 hours, USS S-17, was attacked in error by a US aircraft in position 11°34'N, 78°36'W. Minor damage sustained required a return to the Panama Canal Zone.
11 Aug 1942 USS S-17 departed the Panama Canal Zone for New London, Connecticut.
24 Sep 1942 USS S-17 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard for a refit.
26 Sep 1942 USS S-17 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for a refit.
7 Dec 1942 With her refit completed, USS S-17, departed the Philadelphia Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut.
8 Dec 1942 USS S-17 arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
21 Dec 1942 USS S-17 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
22 Dec 1942 USS S-17 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
14 Feb 1943 USS S-17 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
15 Feb 1943 USS S-17 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
23 Mar 1943 USS S-17 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
24 Mar 1943 USS S-17 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
2 May 1943 USS S-17 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
3 May 1943 USS S-17 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
10 Aug 1943 USS S-17 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
11 Aug 1943 USS S-17 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
6 Sep 1943 USS S-17 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
7 Sep 1943 USS S-17 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
